channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Inside Ibiza's Ultra-Luxury Weekend Party Scene: Spending, Staff and Excesses
item.description: Ibiza has long been a playground for tourists seeking sun, beaches and nightlife, but a new echelon of ultra-wealthy visitors is taking indulgence to unprecedented levels. Domenique Wissink, a 26-year...

item.title: Babu Owino Faces Arrest Warrant Over Post About Interior PS Raymond Omollo
item.description: Embankasi East MP Babu Owino has come out openly claiming that the government is plotting to arrest him over a social media post directed at Interior PS Raymond Omollo. According to Babu, a warrant wa...

item.title: Kilimanjaro Marathon attracts strong local and international support
item.description: The Kilimanjaro Marathon in Moshi, Tanzania, is once again drawing big attention from both local businesses and international athletes. Set for March 22, 2026, the event will feature a 42km full marat...

item.title: Landmark Lawsuit Challenges Social Media Platforms' Addictive Design Features Under Product Liability
item.description: A significant trial in a Los Angeles courtroom is examining whether social media platforms like Instagram and YouTube can be held liable for harms caused by their design, rather than user-generated co...

item.title: Challenges and responsibilities of the sex discrimination commissioner in addressing gender issues
item.description: In this opinion piece, former sex discrimination commissioner and NSW Liberal minister Pru Goward reflects on the challenging nature of the sex discrimination commissioner role. Goward highlights how ...

item.title: Tirupati Laddu Controversy Sparks Political Debate in Andhra Pradesh
item.description: For the past one and a half years, the humble Tirupati laddu has unexpectedly become a focal point in Andhra Pradesh’s political discourse. This is no ordinary sweet; the laddu is offered as mahaprasa...

item.title: Canada adjusts clocks for daylight saving time as B.C. moves to permanent daylight time
item.description: On Sunday, most of Canada will move clocks forward one hour at 2 a.m. as daylight saving time begins, continuing until November 1 when clocks revert to standard time. British Columbia, however, will n...

item.title: Explosion at Dali Nightclub in Trujillo, Peru, Injures 33 People Including Three Minors Amid Rising Extortion Violence
item.description: A powerful explosion struck the Dali nightclub in Trujillo, a coastal city in Peru's La Libertad region, in the pre-dawn hours of March 7, 2026, injuring 33 people, authorities reported. The blast occ...

item.title: FG Panel Approves UNN VC’s Actions in Investigating Former Minister’s Academic Records
item.description: The Federal Government investigative panel don commend the Vice-Chancellor of University of Nigeria, Nsukka, Prof. Simon Ortuanya, and former Acting VC, Prof. Oguejiofor Ujam, for their role in exposi...

item.title: Challenges and Waiting Periods in Tanzanian Health Insurance
item.description: Hospitals in Tanzania are often stressful places where nobody comes in a happy mood. While waiting in line, people end up sharing their experiences, and sometimes these conversations reveal bigger iss...

item.title: Iran’s leadership apologizes amid ongoing regional missile and drone attacks
item.description: Iran’s President Masoud Pezeshkian issued an apology for attacks on neighbouring countries, even as Iranian missiles and drones continued to target Gulf Arab states. The apology highlights the apparen...

item.title: The case for expanding Australia’s parliament to improve representation
item.description: The Albanese government is advocating for an increase of 40 seats in the Australian parliament ahead of the next federal election. Proponents argue that a larger parliament would make politicians more...

item.title: SADC Urges Member States to Boost Regional Trade and Strengthen Food Security
item.description: The Southern African Development Community (SADC) imeongeza mwito kwa nchi wanachama zake kuchukua hatua za haraka katika kuimarisha ushirikiano wa kibiashara ndani ya eneo hilo. Mwito huu umetolewa n...

item.title: National Lottery Lotto results: Winning numbers 9, 37, 39, 40, 47, 51 and Bonus Ball 19 for 7 March 2026 draw
item.description: The National Lottery has announced the results for its Saturday 7 March draw, providing participants with the opportunity to claim prizes from a Lotto jackpot of £7 million. The winning main numbers f...

item.title: Government and IDC challenge proposed liquidation of Tongaat Hulett
item.description: Tongaat Hulett Pty Limited (THL), one of South Africa’s major sugar producers, faces a potential liquidation as its business rescue practitioners (BRPs) argue there’s no viable path for financial reco...

item.title: BRELA Advances Digital Systems to Boost Formal Business Sector
item.description: As Tanzania marches towards its Vision 2050 goals, digital reforms are becoming a major focus for government agencies, especially BRELA, which is seen as the main gateway for formal business operation...

item.title: Ondo State Confirms Eba Island as Its Territory, No Conflict with Ogun over Oil
item.description: Ondo State Governor Lucky Aiyedatiwa don clear ground say Eba Island na part of Ondo State, and sey dem no dey quarrel with Ogun State over the oil wey dey there. Aiyedatiwa talk say their discussions...

item.title: Karnataka Women’s Commission notes low reporting of workplace harassment committees in Dakshina Kannada
item.description: During her four-day tour of Dakshina Kannada, Karnataka State Commission for Women chairperson, Dr. Nagalakshmi Choudhary, highlighted that despite there being over 3,000 workplaces and institutions i...

item.title: Georgina Njenga Shares Worrying Video Hinting at Recurring Past Issues After Valentine's Day with Ex Baha
item.description: Popular Kenyan content creator and former Machachari actress Georgina Njenga has left many fans concerned after posting a video on social media with a cryptic and emotional message. This comes shortly...

item.title: Kim Chiu and Paulo Avelino Discuss Their Chemistry and Preparation for 'The Alibi'
item.description: In a recent interview, Kim Chiu and Paulo Avelino shared insights about their collaboration in the latest ABS-CBN series, 'The Alibi.' Both actors emphasized how their natural on-screen connection mad...
